form.label: Amazon API SLI / SLO Executive Dashboard
form.description: Regenerated Simple XML dashboard with API summary, previous day trend, and API to URL drilldown.

search.query: index=amazon_logs earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ | stats count by api_name | sort api_name | fields api_name

index=amazon_logs earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ [| makeresults | eval search=if("$tok_api$"="*" OR "$tok_api$"="", "", "api_name IN (" . "$tok_api$" . ")") | return $search] | eval is_success=if(status_code>=200 AND status_code<500,1,0) | eval is_fast=if(response_time_ms<=2000,1,0) | stats count as total_requests sum(is_success) as success_requests sum(is_fast) as fast_requests | eval availability_pct=round((success_requests/total_requests)*100,2) | eval latency_sli_pct=round((fast_requests/total_requests)*100,2) | eval overall_status=case( availability_pct<99 OR latency_sli_pct<90,"Red", availability_pct<99.9 OR latency_sli_pct<95,"Amber", true(),"Green") | table overall_status

index=amazon_logs earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ [| makeresults | eval search=if("$tok_api$"="*" OR "$tok_api$"="", "", "api_name IN (" . "$tok_api$" . ")") | return $search] | eval is_success=if(status_code>=200 AND status_code<500,1,0) | stats count as total_requests sum(is_success) as success_requests | eval availability_pct=round((success_requests/total_requests)*100,2) | table availability_pct

index=amazon_logs earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ [| makeresults | eval search=if("$tok_api$"="*" OR "$tok_api$"="", "", "api_name IN (" . "$tok_api$" . ")") | return $search] | eval is_fast=if(response_time_ms<=2000,1,0) | stats count as total_requests sum(is_fast) as fast_requests | eval latency_sli_pct=round((fast_requests/total_requests)*100,2) | table latency_sli_pct

index=amazon_logs earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ [| makeresults | eval search=if("$tok_api$"="*" OR "$tok_api$"="", "", "api_name IN (" . "$tok_api$" . ")") | return $search] | stats count as total_requests | table total_requests

index=amazon_logs earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ [| makeresults | eval search=if("$tok_api$"="*" OR "$tok_api$"="", "", "api_name IN (" . "$tok_api$" . ")") | return $search] | eval is_success=if(status_code>=200 AND status_code<500,1,0) | eval is_error=if(status_code>=500,1,0) | eval is_fast=if(response_time_ms<=2000,1,0) | stats count as total_requests sum(is_success) as success_requests sum(is_error) as error_requests sum(is_fast) as fast_requests sparkline(count,1h) as req_trend by api_name | eval availability_pct=round((success_requests/total_requests)*100,2) | eval latency_sli_pct=round((fast_requests/total_requests)*100,2) | eval error_rate_pct=round((error_requests/total_requests)*100,2) | eval rag_status=case( availability_pct<99 OR latency_sli_pct<90,"Red", availability_pct<99.9 OR latency_sli_pct<95,"Amber", true(),"Green") | table api_name total_requests availability_pct latency_sli_pct error_rate_pct rag_status req_trend | sort api_name

index=amazon_logs earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ [| makeresults | eval search=if("$tok_api$"="*" OR "$tok_api$"="", "", "api_name IN (" . "$tok_api$" . ")") | return $search] | timechart span=15m perc95(response_time_ms) as p95_latency_ms by api_name

index=amazon_logs earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ [| makeresults | eval search=if("$tok_api$"="*" OR "$tok_api$"="", "", "api_name IN (" . "$tok_api$" . ")") | return $search] | eval is_error=if(status_code>=500,1,0) | timechart span=15m sum(is_error) by api_name

index=amazon_logs earliest=-48h@h latest=now [| makeresults | eval search=if("$tok_api$"="*" OR "$tok_api$"="", "", "api_name IN (" . "$tok_api$" . ")") | return $search] | timechart span=15m count as requests | timewrap 1d series=relative

index=amazon_logs earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ api_name="$tok_selected_api$" | eval url_name=coalesce(url, uri, endpoint, request_path) | where isnotnull(url_name) | eval is_success=if(status_code>=200 AND status_code<500,1,0) | eval is_error=if(status_code>=500,1,0) | eval is_fast=if(response_time_ms<=2000,1,0) | stats count as total_requests sum(is_success) as success_requests sum(is_error) as error_requests sum(is_fast) as fast_requests sparkline(count,1h) as req_trend by url_name | eval availability_pct=round((success_requests/total_requests)*100,2) | eval latency_sli_pct=round((fast_requests/total_requests)*100,2) | eval error_rate_pct=round((error_requests/total_requests)*100,2) | rename url_name as url | sort - total_requests | table url total_requests availability_pct latency_sli_pct error_rate_pct req_trend

index=amazon_logs earliest=$tok_time.earliest$ latest=$tok_time.latest$ api_name="$tok_selected_api$" | eval url_name=coalesce(url, uri, endpoint, request_path) | search url_name="$tok_selected_url$" | timechart span=15m count as request_count sum(eval(status_code>=500)) as error_count
